barRaise.topFinding: Sixteenth review, and the first in three runs with a real positive delta instead of a duplicate. Genuine new work sits in the working tree, uncommitted: the N2 PWA icon gap is resolved (real sized icon-192/512, maskable-512, apple-touch 180/152/120, favicon-32/16, icon-144/96 now in assets/, with manifest.json, the index.html head links, and the sw.js precache list all repointed off assets/temp-logo.png), and scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1 got a substantive hardening pass (the read-back now parses the JSON and rejects NUL bytes instead of trusting byte-equality, corrupt JSON recovers the last good version from YaE git history rather than nulling fields, and new completion/itemsLeft/metrics blocks ship). Because none of it is committed, the version is still 0.51.2 and the six standing MEDIUMs all carry verbatim, their files untouched: the unminified release bundle, the twelve-layer styles-v2..v13 cascade, the TypeScript-major straddle, the unmeasured basket-coordinate launch gate, the missing Decision 30 home, and the post-1.0 worker/src/index.js monolith. Zero HIGHs. Verdict holds at needs-attention, but the route to healthy is now shorter than it looks: ship this working tree, then knock the four quick doc/build MEDIUMs.
